name: ExtensionResearchStudy_Classifier
title: R5: Classification for the study (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ResearchStudy.classifier` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ResearchStudy.classifier` 0..* `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ResearchStudy.classifier` 0..* `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ResearchStudy.classifier` has a context of ResearchStudy based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `ResearchStudy`.
Element `ResearchStudy.classifier` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.comment:
Element `ResearchStudy.classifier` has a context of ResearchStudy based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `ResearchStudy`.
Element `ResearchStudy.classifier` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.definition: Additional grouping mechanism or categorization of a research study. Example: FDA regulated device, FDA regulated drug, MPG Paragraph 23b (a German legal requirement), IRB-exempt, etc. Implementation Note: do not use the classifier element to support existing semantics that are already supported thru explicit elements in the resource.
